ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "image_name" TEXT /* Name of the image */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded */,
  "original_file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the original image file */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image (foreign key to users) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compression_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compression setting */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being compressed */,
  "quality" INTEGER /* Quality of the compression (e.g., 100, 50) */,
  "k_value" INTEGER /* Value of k used in the compression algorithm */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compression algorithm used (foreign key to compression_algorithms) */,
  "compression_date" TEXT /* Date when the compression was performed */,
  "compression_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the compression process in seconds */,
  "additional_parameters" TEXT /* Additional parameters used in the compression algorithm (e.g., color space, quantization matrix) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compression_settings_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES compression_algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compression_settings_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compression_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compression result */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compression setting */,
  "mse" REAL /* Mean Squared Error (MSE) of the compressed image */,
  "psnr" REAL /* Peak Signal-to-Noise Ratio (PSNR) of the compressed image */,
  "embed_file_size" INTEGER /* Embedded file size of the compressed image */,
  "compression_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of the original file size to the compressed file size */,
  "compression_quality" TEXT /* Qualitative description of the compression quality (e.g., High, Medium) */,
  "compression_algorithm" TEXT /* Name of the compression algorithm used (redundant for convenience) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compression_results_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES compression_settings ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dct_coefficients" (
  "dct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DCT coefficient set */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compression result */,
  "dct_coefficients" TEXT /* Array of DCT coefficients */,
  "dct_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of DCT coefficients (e.g., Uniform, Non-uniform) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dct_coefficients_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES compression_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_sizes" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file size record */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compression result */,
  "written_file_size" INTEGER /* Written file size of the compressed image */,
  "total_file_size" INTEGER /* Total file size of the compressed image */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* Extension of the compressed file (e.g., .jpg, .png) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the compressed file on the server */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_sizes_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES compression_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compression_algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compression algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the compression algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compression algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was added to the system */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the image format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the format was added to the system */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the format was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qualities" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compression quality */,
  "quality_value" INTEGER /* Value of the compression quality (e.g., 100, 50) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compression quality */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the quality was added to the system */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the quality was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "k_values" (
  "k_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each k value */,
  "k_value" INTEGER /* Value of k used in the compression algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the k value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the k value was added to the system */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the k value was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("k_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mse_values" (
  "mse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MSE value */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compression result */,
  "mse_value" REAL /* Value of the Mean Squared Error (MSE) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the MSE value was recorded */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the MSE value was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mse_values_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES compression_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "psnr_values" (
  "psnr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PSNR value */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compression result */,
  "psnr_value" REAL /* Value of the Peak Signal-to-Noise Ratio (PSNR) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the PSNR value was recorded */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the PSNR value was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("psnr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_psnr_values_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES compression_results ("result_id")
)
